claims.text: Blomfield has publicly advocated for radical product polish in consumer fintech.

citation.quote: The bar for consumer fintech has moved from features to polish.

narrative_additions.text: Tom Blomfield, generally considered one of the most accomplished consumer fintech founders of his generation, has navigated a career that spans the early UK payments boom, the rise of digital-only banking, and the recent transition into venture capital, with multiple commentators publicly describing him as a once-in-a-decade operator whose taste for product detail set the bar for an entire cohort of European founders.
